'''Frekka''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and a flight simulation controller on both [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and the ''[[Venture]]'' during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
